title: Because I Love You
overview: Lee Hyeong is a talented songwriter. He happens to connect people who are not good with love.  Those include Hyeong-Gyeong who wants to become a singer, but she suffers from stage fright. Scully is a high school student. She helps Lee Hyeong's spirit. Chan-Young is a colleague of Lee Hyeong and he likes Hyeong-Gyeong, but in vain.
